✨ TIP: You can move and resize the accessory on the ROBLOX App to make it just perfect~! (*≧ω≦)♡

 A mischievous devil cat with horns and a trident, ready to sit on your shoulder and spread Halloween chaos.


🌟 Please favorite our items to show your love, even if you don’t buy them! It really helps us and lets us bring your cute ideas to life~ 💖

Tags: devil cat, halloween pet, shoulder pet, cat companion, spooky, demon cat, halloween accessory, cute pet, devil horns, trident cat
